events.name: Settlement of a claim by “Avina de Samelesbyri” against “Robert de Hampton and Margery his wife” relating to “a mill and...land...in Brihtmede,” under which Avina received the mill for life, reverting to “Robert and Margery, Cecilia and Elyzabeth younger sisters of Margery as heirs of the said Avina”[830].  records that Breightmet in 1302 was held by “Robert de Holland and John Deuias, the respective husbands of Elizabeth and Cecily.”

zh.lifeSummary: 當Avina Notton於大約1220年出生在英國藍卡爾博爾頓時，她的父親William de Notton Lord of Breightmet47歲，母親Cecily Breightmet42歲。她於大約1240年與William de Samlesbury在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Notton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Notton in Lacock (Wilts) or Notton in Maiden Newton (Dorset), both of which are recorded as Natton and Netton in the 13th century. The place-names derive from Old English nēat ‘cattle’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. There has probably been some confusion with Noton .

variants.name: Natton
meanings: English: variant of both   Notton   and   Noton  .

variants.name: Noton
meanings: English: locative name from Notton (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Notone in 1086 and Nocton in 1230. The place-name derives from Old English hnoc ‘wether sheep’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. There has probably been some confusion with Notton , and perhaps also with Knutton and Nocton .

nameMeanings.name: Avina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Avina Notton was born about 1220, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, her father, William de Notton Lord of Breightmet, was 47 and her mother, Cecily Breightmet, was 42. She married William de Samlesbury about 1240, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1285, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avina Notton est née environ 1220, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Notton Lord of Breightmet, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Cecily Breightmet, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé William de Samlesbury environ 1240, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1285, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avina Notton um 1220 in Bolton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Notton Lord of Breightmet 47 und ihre Mutter Cecily Breightmet 42. Sie hat um 1240 in Lancashire, England William de Samlesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1285 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato William de Samlesbury circa 1240, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1285, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ko.Barton, Leicestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 바턴 인 테 브이스
ko.lifeSummary: Avina Notton(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Notton Lord of Breightmet(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Breightmet(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 영국 랭카실르에서 William de Samlesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avina Notton nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Notton Lord of Breightmet, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Breightmet, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Samlesbury aproximadamente 1240, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1285, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.Barton, Leicestershire, England: бартон ин т бинс, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avina Notton родилась около 1220 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Notton Lord of Breightmet было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Breightmet, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Samlesbury около 1240 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1285 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

Se casó con William de Samlesbury aproximadamente 1240, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1285, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
